message:
franken_numpy-conf: add cond_mxn conformance tests

Add cond_mxn operation support to linalg conformance suite:
- Add cond_mxn to imports and operation handler
- Add test cases for rectangular 2x3 and 3x2 matrices with
  oracle-verified expected values

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
